3029490.name: Iteriba: Olokun's Wrath
3029490.description:
Olokun, Orisha of Deepest Waters, brought abyssal minions and an calamitous wave to destroy the city of Ilê-Ifé and punish humanity. To save his people and defeat Olokun, the prince of Ilê-Ifé - Okanbi - will need all the help he can get.

Okanbi must make offerings to the Orishas with flowers and fruits, asking for their help and wisdom in this difficult time. The Orishas will assist on his journey with Gifts and Blessings - powers that use the energy present in all things: Ashé. With the power of Ashé and the wisdom of the Orishas, Okanbi can defeat the creatures from the depths and stop Olokun's Wrath!

Iteriba: Olokun's Wrath is a 2D platformer with Metroidvania elements and vector graphics. Explore the map in search for the Orishas and borrow their powers in order to progress. To do so, you can:
  • Navigate a vast environment and discover its secrets;
  • Fight your own way by customizing your powers through Blessings.
  • Defeat the monsters from the depths summoned by Olokun;
  • Meet various characters, including Orishas, to learn about the game's narrative and Yoruba culture;
